description: This pipeline annotates incoming data with source information and then tracks spots based on these annotations, allowing for the grouping of related data items.

a04a95ad-bb78-4381-b3d3-d5afe78dcd72.name: annotate-with-source-slot
a04a95ad-bb78-4381-b3d3-d5afe78dcd72.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

20f5d3ad-76fb-4b8b-8c5c-ebe8564c6ed1.name: trackmate-tracking
20f5d3ad-76fb-4b8b-8c5c-ebe8564c6ed1.description:
Track spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
